import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/App.tsx");const useState = __vite__cjsImport0_react["useState"]; const useEffect = __vite__cjsImport0_react["useEffect"]; const useRef = __vite__cjsImport0_react["useRef"];const L = __vite__cjsImport2_leaflet;const _jsxDEV = __vite__cjsImport6_react_jsxDevRuntime["jsxDEV"];import __vite__cjsImport0_react from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react.js?v=96a850c3";
import { MapContainer, TileLayer, Marker, Popup, useMap } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react-leaflet.js?v=23cfb37e";
import __vite__cjsImport2_leaflet from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/leaflet.js?v=19a93e8e";
import "/node_modules/leaflet/dist/leaflet.css";
import { Info, Car, BatteryCharging, AlertTriangle, MessageSquare, Search } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=46bdb22e";
import unfulfilledData from "/src/data/unfulfilled_data.json?import&t=1778828506852";
var _jsxFileName = "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/프로젝트/미이행현장조사/unfulfilled-app/src/App.tsx";
import __vite__cjsImport6_react_jsxDevRuntime from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react_jsx-dev-runtime.js?v=96a850c3";
var _s = $RefreshSig$(), _s2 = $RefreshSig$();
// Initial Data parsing
const initialData = unfulfilledData;
const GWANGSAN_OFFICE_CENTER = [35.139647, 126.793644];
const firstValid = initialData.find((f) => f.lat && f.lng) || null;
// Custom Icons
const createCustomIcon = (isParking, isCharger) => {
	let color = "#ef4444";
	if (isParking && !isCharger) color = "#f97316";
	if (!isParking && isCharger) color = "#eab308";
	if (isParking && isCharger) color = "#dc2626";
	const svgPin = `
    <svg width="40" height="50" viewBox="0 0 40 50" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="filter: drop-shadow(0px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.4));">
      <path d="M20 0C8.95431 0 0 8.95431 0 20C0 31.0457 20 50 20 50C20 50 40 31.0457 40 20C40 8.95431 31.0457 0 20 0Z" fill="${color}" fill-opacity="1"/>
      <circle cx="20" cy="20" r="8" fill="white" fill-opacity="1"/>
    </svg>
  `;
	return L.divIcon({
		html: `
      <div style="position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; width: 40px;">
        <div style="width: 40px; height: 50px;">
          ${svgPin}
        </div>
      </div>
    `,
		className: "custom-survey-marker",
		iconSize: [40, 50],
		iconAnchor: [20, 50],
		popupAnchor: [0, -45]
	});
};
function MapController({ facility, markerRefs }) {
	_s();
	const map = useMap();
	// Fix for gray map issue
	useEffect(() => {
		// A simple timeout to invalidate size after layout is complete
		const timer = setTimeout(() => {
			map.invalidateSize();
		}, 250);
		return () => clearTimeout(timer);
	}, [map]);
	// Center map and open popup when facility changes
	useEffect(() => {
		if (facility && facility.lat && facility.lng) {
			map.flyTo([facility.lat, facility.lng], 16, {
				animate: true,
				duration: .5
			});
			const timer = setTimeout(() => {
				const marker = markerRefs.current[facility.id];
				if (marker) {
					marker.openPopup();
				}
			}, 600);
			return () => clearTimeout(timer);
		}
	}, [
		facility,
		map,
		markerRefs
	]);
	return null;
}
_s(MapController, "6ZOecnrxv53JrHzDImdIeO61qA4=", false, function() {
	return [useMap];
});
_c = MapController;
function App() {
	_s2();
	const [facilities] = useState(initialData);
	const [selectedFacility, setSelectedFacility] = useState(null);
	const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState("");
	const markerRefs = useRef({});
	const initialCenter = GWANGSAN_OFFICE_CENTER;
	const handleFacilityClick = (facility) => {
		setSelectedFacility(facility);
	};
	const filteredFacilities = facilities.filter((f) => f.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) || f.address.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()));

_s2(App, "535mEqBfm66f7BN2CZhPZjb9Qnw=");
_c2 = App;

var _c, _c2;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "MapController");
$RefreshReg$(_c2, "App");
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== 'undefined' && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
import * as __vite_react_currentExports from "/src/App.tsx?t=1778830462168";
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }

  const currentExports = __vite_react_currentExports;
  queueMicrotask(() => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/프로젝트/미이행현장조사/unfulfilled-app/src/App.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/프로젝트/미이행현장조사/unfulfilled-app/src/App.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
function $RefreshReg$(type, id) { return RefreshRuntime.register(type, "C:/Users/Administrator/Desktop/프로젝트/미이행현장조사/unfulfilled-app/src/App.tsx" + ' ' + id); }
function $RefreshSig$() { return RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform(); }

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
